endpoints.name: GET /v1/projects/{projectId}/regions/{region}/clusters
endpoints.description: Lists all regions/{region}/clusters in a project alphabetically.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid. Replace {{REGION}} with a real region.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/projects/{projectId}/regions/{region}/clusters
endpoints.description: Creates a cluster in a project. The returned Operation.metadata will be ClusterOperationMetadata (https://cloud.google.com/dataproc/docs/reference/rpc/google.cloud.dataproc.v1#clusteroperationmetadata).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid. Replace {{REGION}} with a real region.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/projects/{projectId}/regions/{region}/clusters/{clusterName}
endpoints.description: Gets the resource representation for a cluster in a project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid. Replace {{REGION}} with a real region. Replace {{CLUSTERNAME}} with a real clustername.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/projects/{projectId}/regions/{region}/clusters/{clusterName}
endpoints.description: Deletes a cluster in a project. The returned Operation.metadata will be ClusterOperationMetadata (https://cloud.google.com/dataproc/docs/reference/rpc/google.cloud.dataproc.v1#clusteroperationmetadata).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid. Replace {{REGION}} with a real region. Replace {{CLUSTERNAME}} with a real clustername.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v1/projects/{projectId}/regions/{region}/clusters/{clusterName}
endpoints.description: Updates a cluster in a project. The returned Operation.metadata will be ClusterOperationMetadata (https://cloud.google.com/dataproc/docs/reference/rpc/google.cloud.dataproc.v1#clusteroperationmetadata). The cluster must be in a RUNNING state or an error is returned.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid. Replace {{REGION}} with a real region. Replace {{CLUSTERNAME}} with a real clustername.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/projects/{projectId}/regions/{region}/clusters/{clusterName}:diagnose
endpoints.description: Gets cluster diagnostic information. The returned Operation.metadata will be ClusterOperationMetadata (https://cloud.google.com/dataproc/docs/reference/rpc/google.cloud.dataproc.v1#clusteroperationmetadata). After the operation completes, Operation.response contains DiagnoseClusterResults (https://cloud.google.com/dataproc/docs/reference/rpc/google.cloud.dataproc.v1#diagnoseclusterresults).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid. Replace {{REGION}} with a real region. Replace {{CLUSTERNAME}} with a real clustername.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/projects/{projectId}/regions/{region}/clusters/{clusterName}:repair
endpoints.description: Repairs a cluster.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid. Replace {{REGION}} with a real region. Replace {{CLUSTERNAME}} with a real clustername.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/projects/{projectId}/regions/{region}/clusters/{clusterName}:start
endpoints.description: Starts a cluster in a project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid. Replace {{REGION}} with a real region. Replace {{CLUSTERNAME}} with a real clustername.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/projects/{projectId}/regions/{region}/clusters/{clusterName}:stop
endpoints.description: Stops a cluster in a project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid. Replace {{REGION}} with a real region. Replace {{CLUSTERNAME}} with a real clustername.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/projects/{projectId}/regions/{region}/jobs
endpoints.description: Lists regions/{region}/jobs in a project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid. Replace {{REGION}} with a real region.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/projects/{projectId}/regions/{region}/jobs/{jobId}
endpoints.description: Gets the resource representation for a job in a project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid. Replace {{JOBID}} with a real jobid. Replace {{REGION}} with a real region.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/projects/{projectId}/regions/{region}/jobs/{jobId}
endpoints.description: Deletes the job from the project. If the job is active, the delete fails, and the response returns FAILED_PRECONDITION.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid. Replace {{JOBID}} with a real jobid. Replace {{REGION}} with a real region.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v1/projects/{projectId}/regions/{region}/jobs/{jobId}
endpoints.description: Updates a job in a project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid. Replace {{JOBID}} with a real jobid. Replace {{REGION}} with a real region.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/projects/{projectId}/regions/{region}/jobs/{jobId}:cancel
endpoints.description: Starts a job cancellation request. To access the job resource after cancellation, call regions/{region}/jobs.list (https://cloud.google.com/dataproc/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.regions.jobs/list) or regions/{region}/jobs.get (https://cloud.google.com/dataproc/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.regions.jobs/get).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid. Replace {{JOBID}} with a real jobid. Replace {{REGION}} with a real region.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/projects/{projectId}/regions/{region}/jobs:submit
endpoints.description: Submits a job to a cluster.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid. Replace {{REGION}} with a real region.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/projects/{projectId}/regions/{region}/jobs:submitAsOperation
endpoints.description: Submits job to a cluster.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid. Replace {{REGION}} with a real region.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{name}
endpoints.description: Retrieves the latest workflow template.Can retrieve previously instantiated template by specifying optional version parameter.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PUT /v1/{name}
endpoints.description: Updates (replaces) workflow template. The updated template must contain version that matches the current server version.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/{name}
endpoints.description: Deletes a workflow template. It does not cancel in-progress workflows.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{name}:cancel
endpoints.description: Starts asynchronous cancellation on a long-running operation. The server makes a best effort to cancel the operation, but success is not guaranteed. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns google.rpc.Code.UNIMPLEMENTED. Clients can use Operations.GetOperation or other methods to check whether the cancellation succeeded or whether the operation completed despite cancellation. On successful cancellation, the operation is not deleted; instead, it becomes an operation with an Operation.error value with a google.rpc.Status.code of 1, corresponding to Code.CANCELLED.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{name}:instantiate
endpoints.description: Instantiates a template and begins execution.The returned Operation can be used to track execution of workflow by polling operations.get. The Operation will complete when entire workflow is finished.The running workflow can be aborted via operations.cancel. This will cause any inflight jobs to be cancelled and workflow-owned clusters to be deleted.The Operation.metadata will be WorkflowMetadata (https://cloud.google.com/dataproc/docs/reference/rpc/google.cloud.dataproc.v1#workflowmetadata). Also see Using WorkflowMetadata (https://cloud.google.com/dataproc/docs/concepts/workflows/debugging#using_workflowmetadata).On successful completion, Operation.response will be Empty.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{name}:resize
endpoints.description: Resizes a node group in a cluster. The returned Operation.metadata is NodeGroupOperationMetadata (https://cloud.google.com/dataproc/docs/reference/rpc/google.cloud.dataproc.v1#nodegroupoperationmetadata).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/autoscalingPolicies
endpoints.description: Lists autoscaling policies in the project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{parent}/autoscalingPolicies
endpoints.description: Creates new autoscaling policy.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/batches
endpoints.description: Lists batch workloads.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{parent}/batches
endpoints.description: Creates a batch workload that executes asynchronously.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{parent}/nodeGroups
endpoints.description: Creates a node group in a cluster. The returned Operation.metadata is NodeGroupOperationMetadata (https://cloud.google.com/dataproc/docs/reference/rpc/google.cloud.dataproc.v1#nodegroupoperationmetadata).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/workflowTemplates
endpoints.description: Lists workflows that match the specified filter in the request.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{parent}/workflowTemplates
endpoints.description: Creates new workflow template.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{parent}/workflowTemplates:instantiateInline
endpoints.description: Instantiates a template and begins execution.This method is equivalent to executing the sequence CreateWorkflowTemplate, InstantiateWorkflowTemplate, DeleteWorkflowTemplate.The returned Operation can be used to track execution of workflow by polling operations.get. The Operation will complete when entire workflow is finished.The running workflow can be aborted via operations.cancel. This will cause any inflight jobs to be cancelled and workflow-owned clusters to be deleted.The Operation.metadata will be WorkflowMetadata (https://cloud.google.com/dataproc/docs/reference/rpc/google.cloud.dataproc.v1#workflowmetadata). Also see Using WorkflowMetadata (https://cloud.google.com/dataproc/docs/concepts/workflows/debugging#using_workflowmetadata).On successful completion, Operation.response will be Empty.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{project}/{region}/{cluster}:injectCredentials
endpoints.description: Inject encrypted credentials into all of the VMs in a cluster.The target cluster must be a personal auth cluster assigned to the user who is issuing the RPC.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{CLUSTER}} with a real cluster. Replace {{REGION}} with a real region.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{resource}:getIamPolicy
endpoints.description: Gets the access control policy for a resource. Returns an empty policy if the resource exists and does not have a policy set.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCE}} with a real resource.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{resource}:setIamPolicy
endpoints.description: Sets the access control policy on the specified resource. Replaces any existing policy.Can return NOT_FOUND, INVALID_ARGUMENT, and PERMISSION_DENIED errors.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCE}} with a real resource.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{resource}:testIamPermissions
endpoints.description: Returns permissions that a caller has on the specified resource. If the resource does not exist, this will return an empty set of permissions, not a NOT_FOUND error.Note: This operation is designed to be used for building permission-aware UIs and command-line tools, not for authorization checking. This operation may "fail open" without warning.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCE}} with a real resource.
